originalTitle: Dow Jones Futures Rise; Google, Tesla Fall On Earnings, Capex, But AI Stocks Climb
summary: Futures edged higher. Google and Tesla retreated on earnings and heavy capital spending, but AI hardware plays rose.
content: Futures edged higher. Google and Tesla retreated on earnings and heavy capital spending, but AI hardware plays rose.
chineseTitle: 道琼斯期货上涨；谷歌、特斯拉因盈利和资本支出下降，但 AI 股票上涨
chineseSummary: 期货小幅走高。谷歌和特斯拉因盈利和巨额资本支出而回落，但人工智能硬件股上涨。
chineseContent: 期货小幅走高。谷歌和特斯拉因盈利和巨额资本支出而回落，但人工智能硬件股上涨。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
